scope: Tester feedback: desktop hero filters, home order, search accuracy, favourites and report-ad
root_causes: The replacement desktop location select could be hidden by a later generic native-select cleanup pass.
Hero controls were rebuilt during repeated stabilization passes.
Supabase Latest Ads was inserted before Browse Categories while bundled Featured/Latest sections remained.
Search used interior substring matching, producing false positives such as cat in education/location.
Latest-card hearts had no persistent click implementation.
Report this ad had no action and its mobile wrapper was hidden.
fixed: Stable desktop Category/Location controls with aligned arrows
Hero -> Browse Categories -> Latest Ads order
Persistent favourite toggle with React-store synchronization
Mobile/desktop report modal and server API
production_limitations: No live Vercel deployment was performed from the validation environment.
No real production Supabase report row was inserted; the API insert was tested with a mocked Supabase response.
